title: Adversarial Defense: Basic Code Commenting
scenario: Write a comment to explain the purpose of the code snippet 'print('Hello World!')'. Consider the constraints of the code snippet and the desired output. The target LLM output should be the comment.
constraints: Must be written in clear and concise language

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the comment meets the length constraint.
Check if the comment is clear and easy to understand.
Check if the comment is relevant to the code snippet.
